CREATE TABLE xml_data (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, xml_content VARCHAR);
CREATE TABLE xslt_styles (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, sheet_uri VARCHAR);

DECLARE sheet, xml VARCHAR; DECLARE xml_entity ANY; DECLARE myparams ANY; sheet := 'virt://WS.WS.SYS_DAV_RES.RES_FULL_PATH.RES_CONTENT:/DAV/stylesheets/mysheet.xsl'; xml := (SELECT xml_content FROM xml_data WHERE id = 1); xml_entity := xtree_doc(xml); myparams := vector('chapter', 'chapter_value', 'imgroot', '/DAV/images/'); SELECT http_value(xslt(sheet, xml_entity, myparams));
DECLARE myparams2 ANY; myparams2 := vector('chapter', NULL, 'imgroot', '/DAV/images/'); SELECT http_value(xslt(sheet, xml_entity, myparams2));
DECLARE myparams3 ANY; myparams3 := vector('chapter', 'overview', 'imgroot', '/DAV/images/'); SELECT http_value(xslt(sheet, xml_entity, myparams3));
CREATE TABLE xml_source_data (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, xml_source VARCHAR);
DECLARE xml_source VARCHAR; xml_source := (SELECT xml_source FROM xml_source_data WHERE id = 1); xml_entity := xtree_doc(xml_source); SELECT http_value(xslt(sheet, xml_entity, myparams3));
CREATE TABLE transformation_history (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, transformation_result VARCHAR);
INSERT INTO transformation_history (id, transformation_result) VALUES (1, http_value(xslt(sheet, xml_entity, myparams)));
SELECT * FROM transformation_history WHERE transformation_result IS NOT NULL;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM transformation_history WHERE transformation_result LIKE '%chapter_value%';
